skill.name: resume-optimizer
skill.description: Resume optimization expert — input your resume for JD matching analysis, improvement suggestions, and interview question predictions.
skill.summary: Analyze your resume against job descriptions to identify gaps, get optimization suggestions, and prepare for interviews.
skill.author: Hermes-Sedimentary

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged two high-severity patterns in SKILL.md: a 'weak cryptographic algorithm' at line 4 and 'high file entropy' at line 1. Both findings are false positives. Line 4 contains only a YAML description field with Chinese text. The elevated entropy is caused by Chinese characters, emoji, and markdown syntax in a legitimate skill description file. There is no cryptography, obfuscation, or malicious code. The skill is a straightforward resume optimization prompt with no security concerns.

content.user_title: Optimize Your Resume for Target Jobs
content.value_statement: Job seekers often struggle to tailor their resumes to specific job descriptions, missing key matching opportunities. This skill analyzes your resume against a job description, identifies gaps, and provides actionable optimization suggestions plus predicted interview questions.
actual_capabilities: Analyze resume content against a specific job description for keyword and skill matching
Identify gaps between your experience and job requirements
Suggest concrete resume improvements tailored to the target role
Predict likely interview questions based on the job description
Provide formatting and structure recommendations for resumes
limitations: Cannot access or verify external employment history or credentials
Optimization suggestions are based on the provided text only, not industry-wide data
May not account for region-specific resume conventions or cultural differences

use_cases.title: Tailor Resume for a Specific Application
use_cases.description: Paste your resume and a job description to receive a customized gap analysis and rewrite suggestions that highlight the most relevant experience.
use_cases.target_user: Job seekers applying to competitive positions

use_cases.title: Prepare for Technical Interviews
use_cases.description: Get predicted interview questions based on the job description so you can prepare targeted answers before the interview.

use_cases.title: Improve a Generic Resume
use_cases.description: Transform a one-size-fits-all resume into a role-specific document by following the skill's prioritized improvement checklist.

prompt_templates.title: Quick Match Check
prompt_templates.prompt: Here is my resume: [paste resume]. Here is the job description: [paste JD]. How well does my resume match this role?

prompt_templates.title: Full Optimization
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze my resume against this job description and provide: 1) a match score, 2) top 3 gaps, 3) rewritten bullet points for the top 2 gaps, 4) 5 predicted interview questions.

prompt_templates.title: Career Change Focus
prompt_templates.prompt: I am switching from [current field] to [target field]. Review my resume for this [target role] JD and suggest how to reframe my transferable skills.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - repositioning experience for a new field

prompt_templates.title: Interview Prep Bundle
prompt_templates.prompt: Based on this job description for [role], predict 10 interview questions across behavioral, technical, and situational categories. Then review my resume and suggest which experiences I should highlight for each question.

output_examples.input: Resume of a junior developer applying to a senior backend role
output_examples.output: Match Score: 62/100. Key gaps: (1) No distributed systems experience listed, (2) Missing leadership examples, (3) No mention of CI/CD pipelines. Suggested rewrites: [rewritten bullet points]. Predicted questions: 'Describe a time you mentored a teammate,' 'How would you design a rate-limiter?'

output_examples.input: Generic marketing resume for a product marketing manager role
output_examples.output: Match Score: 71/100. Top gap: Resume focuses on campaign execution but the role requires go-to-market strategy. Recommendation: Add a 'GTM Strategy' section highlighting your product launch experience. Predicted questions: 'Walk me through a product launch from 0 to 1,' 'How do you measure campaign ROI?'

best_practices: Always paste both your full resume and the complete job description for the most accurate analysis
Review and personalize the suggested rewrites rather than copying them verbatim
Use the predicted interview questions as a starting point for deeper research into the company and role
anti_patterns: Do not submit the optimized resume without proofreading, as AI may introduce inaccuracies
Do not rely solely on match scores without understanding the reasoning behind gaps
Do not paste resumes containing sensitive personal information like government IDs or home addresses

faq.question: What information do I need to provide?
faq.answer: Paste your current resume and the full job description you are targeting. The more detail you include, the more precise the analysis will be.

faq.question: Does this skill rewrite my entire resume?
faq.answer: It provides targeted suggestions and sample rewrites for the highest-impact gaps. You decide which changes to apply and how to phrase them.

faq.question: How accurate are the predicted interview questions?
faq.answer: Predictions are based on the job description and common industry patterns. They are a strong starting point for preparation but may not cover every question the interviewer asks.

faq.question: Can I use this for multiple job applications?
faq.answer: Yes. Run the analysis separately for each job description, since every role has different requirements and priorities.

faq.question: Will the skill store or share my resume?
faq.answer: No. All analysis happens within your current conversation. The skill does not store, transmit, or retain any of your data.

faq.question: Does this work for non-technical roles?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill works for any role as long as you provide a relevant job description and an accurate resume.
